summary: Payroll Batch Tab (Заплати) testing completed successfully. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified 3 tabs, week picker (Sat→Fri), day selection, summary cards, worker table, batch creation/payment flow, and no regression on other tabs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Batch feature fully tested. AllReportsPage is at /all-reports (not /reports). The 3 tabs (Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати) work correctly. Payroll tab shows Sat→Fri week picker, day selection checkboxes, summary cards (hours, gross, bonuses, deductions, net), worker table with overtime display, create batch button, mark paid button, and value disclaimer. Batches created during testing were marked as paid.

backend_apis: GET /api/payroll-batch/eligible - returns workers with approved+unpaid entries grouped by day
GET /api/payroll-batch/eligible?week_of - respects week_of parameter for Sat→Fri calculation
POST /api/payroll-batch - creates batch with included_days and adjustments
frontend_ui: Day selection checkboxes for each day
Summary cards: Общо часове, Брутно EUR, Бонуси EUR, Удръжки EUR, Нетно EUR
Worker payroll table with columns: worker, days, hours, normal, overtime, rate, gross, bonuses, deductions, net
Създай пакет button for batch creation
Маркирай платен button after batch created
Платен badge when batch is paid
No eligible message when no approved+unpaid reports
No regression on Всички отчети and Седмица tabs
